_source: Five Parsecs From Home: Planetfall pp.41-42
_description: Contact marker system — scanner blips representing unknown forces during battle

contact_movement.description: Roll 2D6 (Aggression=red, Random=white). Higher die determines direction and distance.
contact_movement.aggression_wins: Move towards nearest squad member, distance = Aggression die in inches
contact_movement.random_wins: Move in random direction, distance = Random die in inches. Not affected by terrain penalties but cannot cross Impassable.
contact_movement.tied: Contact remains in place. If 1 or 2 Contacts on table, place a new Contact adjacent.
contact_movement.edge_behavior: Contacts reaching table edge halt in place instead of leaving.

contact_detection.automatic: Clear Line of Sight with no intervening terrain between squad member and Contact. Occurs at earliest point of move.

obscured_test.condition: Contact in LoS but partially obscured by terrain
obscured_test.note: Single roll per Contact regardless of number of characters in LoS

contact_reveal_table._note: D6, rolled when Contact is detected

entries.result: None: Place 2 new Contacts randomly along battlefield edges
1 Lifeform from Campaign Lifeform Encounters table
2 Lifeforms from Campaign Lifeform Encounters table

revealed_enemy_timing: Revealed enemies always act during the NEXT Enemy Phase. If revealed during an Enemy Phase, they cannot act during the current Phase.
placement: Contact marker removed. Revealed figures placed where marker was. Additional figures within 1" in cover if possible.
